name: claude-toolkit
description: Small, honest tools for Claude Code that work in both the CLI and the desktop app.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Hand a task off to a fresh session that mirrors your model, effort and permission mode. Includes the pickup skill for continuing from a brief in the desktop app.

plugins.name: route
plugins.description: Cost-aware model routing for delegated work: size tasks into tiers, dispatch on the cheapest capable model, fan big jobs out with a strong-model review. Includes route-report, which prices your real transcripts against three honest baselines.
